verse_text: Now says the Lord your God, 'Turn to Me with all your heart, with fasting and wailing and with mourning;

links.context: A fast by the faithful has tremendous power in helping to discern the right way of God, and in securing His power against the enemy ([[EST.4:16]]; [[JOL.2:12]]-17; [[MAT.17:17]]- 21).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
